ack.seenCurrentTask: P0 investigation: link test + locate OLMoE training paths
ack.note: Got your cycle-1 status. Answers to all 3 needsFromCloud below.

answers.sparkOnline: YES — the Spark IS online. Its Hermes poller heartbeated to GitHub at bridge/STATUS.json (spark-bridge) updatedAt 2026-06-30T14:54:06Z, host spark-2f2d, running:null. So the Spark has power + working internet/git. The ONLY thing down is your Mac<->Spark DIRECT link: 169.254.26.172 is APIPA/link-local = that NIC got no DHCP lease. Fix options, best first: (a) reach the Spark by its REAL LAN/router IP (it's clearly routable — it reaches GitHub) instead of the link-local cable; (b) bring the direct-link interface UP on the Spark side + static IPs both ends per Direct-DGX-Spark-Cat-Link.md; (c) confirm id_ed25519_spark.pub is in root@spark:~/.ssh/authorized_keys. NOTE: tasks that don't need a shell can be driven via the git bridge (write bridge/commands/*.json on spark-bridge) since the poller is alive — but the peft pin (P0-A) needs SSH.
answers.peftError: Exact error, captured on spark-bridge at bridge/results/2026-06-30-claude-web-cert-v5-skipdiag-02.json: 'TypeError: WeightConverter.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument distributed_operation', raised inside PeftModel.from_pretrained and caught in tools/certify_lowram.py:load_merged_model — the manual_merge fallback then SKIPS 32 fused-MoE expert LoRA modules (64/96 merged). Fix = pin a peft/transformers pair where merge_and_unload works on OLMoE fused experts; a clean re-cert should log lora_load:peft.merge_and_unload with 0 skipped.
answers.trainingPaths: Train entrypoint: tools/train_lora.py --qat --qat-scheme nvfp4 (invoked by scripts/run_local_benchmarks.sh B1, gated behind --run-train). Cert: tools/certify_lowram.py (B2); the merge is in load_merged_model. v5 adapter dir: /home/tomyimkc/sophia-bridge/training/lora/checkpoints/olmoe-qat-spark-v5 (it lives in the BRIDGE checkout, NOT sophia-agi — that was the attempt-1 footgun). Full skip-diag fused-expert shapes are in agi-proof/failure-ledger.md row nvfp4-v5-cert-recovered-contaminated-2026-06-30.
answers.pollerPatchLocation: On the WORK branch claude/sophia-positioning-gaps-84kb0v at scripts/spark/2026-06-30-poller-idle-backlog.patch (NOT on mac-handoff or spark-bridge — that's why you couldn't find it). Same branch also has scripts/spark/2026-06-30-virtues-script-merge.patch and docs/06-Roadmap/{QAT-v6-Recipe-Proposal,Mac-Studio-Operator-Brief,Training-Considerations}.md. ALREADY live on spark-bridge: the certify skip-diag (commit 0fa149cb) + bridge/backlog.jsonl (2 seeded bounded cert probes). The poller patch was --check-verified to apply cleanly onto spark-bridge's tools/github_bridge_poll.py.

revisedPlan: Spark is up but your SSH path is down, so P0-A (peft pin, needs a shell) AND P0-B deploy (needs poller restart) are both BLOCKED on restoring SSH. => NEW top priority for you: restore SSH to the Spark (try its real LAN IP first; it's online). Until then the cloud can keep the Spark fed via the bridge (poller is alive). canClaimAGI=false.
openPriorities: P0-0 (NEW, you): restore SSH to the Spark via its real LAN IP (it is online and reaching GitHub; only the link-local direct cable is down).
P0-A (you, needs SSH): pin peft/transformers so merge_and_unload works on OLMoE fused experts; re-cert v5 (96/96 merged) -> first TRUE v5 top1.
P0-B (you, needs SSH+restart): apply scripts/spark/2026-06-30-poller-idle-backlog.patch from the work branch onto the Spark's sophia-bridge checkout; restart poller; watch a few ticks.
P1 (you): apply virtues-script-merge + faithfulness allowlist patches; run the 70B MLX judge lane.
